uses-sdk.tools:overrideLibrary: androidx.compose.material, androidx.compose.material.ripple, androidx.compose.material3, androidx.compose.foundation, androidx.compose.foundation.layout, androidx.compose.ui, androidx.compose.ui.util, androidx.compose.ui.tooling, androidx.compose.ui.tooling.preview, androidx.compose.ui.tooling.data, androidx.compose.runtime, androidx.compose.runtime.retain, androidx.compose.runtime.saveable, androidx.compose.runtime.annotation, androidx.compose.animation, androidx.compose.animation.core, androidx.compose.ui.text, androidx.compose.ui.graphics, androidx.compose.ui.unit, androidx.compose.ui.geometry, androidx.compose.ui.test.manifest, androidx.activity.compose, androidx.lifecycle.runtime.compose, androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose, androidx.window, androidx.window.core, androidx.window.layout
